==About==
===Broadcast Talent===
''To be determined.

===Format===
* '''Gauntlet Season 1''' : ''Aug 15th - 19th
** 32 teams
** Squad, {{Abbr/TPP}}
* '''Closed Qualifiers''' : ''Aug 15th - 16th
** 32 teams
*** 24 Invited
*** 8 from Open Qualifiers
** 2 matchdays
** Teams are divided into 2 groups of 16 teams
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 12 teams}} from each group qualify for Semi Finals
* '''Semi Finals''' : ''Aug 17th
** 24 teams
** 3 groups of 8 teams
** 1 matchday
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} qualify for Grand Finals
* '''Grand Finals''' : ''Aug 18th - 19th
** 16 teams
** 2 matchdays
